prompt: Create a cinematic blockbuster movie poster starring a young Black male hero centered in a tight heroic portrait, facing directly forward with a calm, determined expression. Preserve a realistic face with short cropped black hair, natural skin texture, symmetrical frontal lighting, and sharp eye contact. Dress him in a dark futuristic tactical armored suit with black metal chest plates, shoulder armor, straps, seams, scratches, and subtle battle wear. Behind him, show a devastated modern city skyline at dusk under a smoky storm sky, with burning buildings, orange fireballs, drifting embers, thick black smoke, searchlights, and three military helicopters in the sky. Add a rugged armored vehicle on the lower left and small silhouetted people or soldiers in the distant lower right for scale. Use dramatic Hollywood action-poster lighting: warm orange fire glow from the sides and background, cool dark shadows on the armor, high contrast, volumetric smoke, sparks, lens flare, gritty realism, ultra-detailed 8k photographic finish. Add movie-poster typography at the bottom: a small tagline reading ONE HERO. ONE CHOICE. ONE LEGACY., a huge distressed stone-metal title reading LEGACY, and a smaller release line reading IN CINEMAS SUMMER 2025. Keep the composition square, with the hero occupying the central vertical axis, title text layered across the lower torso, no extra logos, no credits block, no watermark.
